mapper.select: /* wms-outbound-hanjinDlvryManager-sql-oracle.xml - selectHanjinDlvrySbmInfoForApiCall - 한진택배 택배사 택배접수정보 데이터 조회 for API */ SELECT DLVYDIV AS SVC_CAT_CD ,OBHDKEY AS CUST_ORD_NO ,WBLNO AS WBLNO ,CNTRCTNO AS CNTRACT_NO ,COLCTREQDAY AS PICKUP_ASK_DT ,SNDPRSNZIPCD AS SNDR_ZIP ,SNDPRSNADDR1 AS SNDR_BASE_ADDR ,SNDPRSNADDR2 AS SNDR_DTL_ADDR ,SNDPRSNNM AS SNDR_NM ,SNDPRSNTELNO AS SNDR_TEL_NO ,SNDPRSNTELNO2 AS SNDR_MOBILE_NO ,NULL AS SNDR_ASK_CNTENT ,SNDPRSNPICHNM AS SNDR_REF_CNTENT ,RCPPRSNZIPCD AS RCVR_ZIP ,pkg_crypto$decrypt(RCPPRSNADDR1, #{encKey}) AS RCVR_BASE_ADDR ,pkg_crypto$decrypt(RCPPRSNADDR2, #{encKey}) AS RCVR_DTL_ADDR ,pkg_crypto$decrypt(RCPPRSNNM, #{encKey}) AS RCVR_NM ,pkg_crypto$decrypt(RCPPRSNTELNO, #{encKey}) AS RCVR_TEL_NO ,pkg_crypto$decrypt(RCPPRSNTELNO2, #{encKey}) AS RCVR_MOBILE_NO ,DLVYMSG AS RCVR_ASK_CNTENT ,RCPPRSNPICHNM AS RCVR_REF_CNTENT ,PAYMTTYPE AS PAY_TYP_CD ,BOXTYPE AS BOX_TYP_CD ,MEMO1 AS PRINT_MEMO1 ,MEMO2 AS PRINT_MEMO2 ,MEMO3 AS PRINT_MEMO3 ,MEMO4 AS PRINT_MEMO4 ,REPICNM AS COMODITY_NM FROM TWORK_INFO_HANJIN_SBM WHERE CTKEY = #{CTKEY} AND OWKEY = #{OWKEY} AND OBHDKEY = #{OBHDKEY} AND WBLNO = #{WBLNO}
